name: Stickman Prison Escape Story 3D
description: You are stuck in prison for a crime you did not commit. Framed and imprisoned, but never gives up and plans to self-salvation. Persevere, day after day, year after year. Hope can set him free. Finally, you can take the breath of freedom.
instructions: Use Arrows or WASD to move Space to jump Shift to run Q - to make somersault Mouse to aim shoot 1-2 to change weapons L to show hide cursor
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Boys, Escape, Fun, Girl, Girls, HTML5, Prison, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Stickman, WebGL
